__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Kay's Flying Shuttle,Gulliver's Travels,Nestor's Cup,Acta Apostolicae Sedis
|rank=blue
|amount=4
|category=self
|description=Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail DEF +7; Relic Points: 5,000,000/5,000,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Relic Points]]
